sourcesContent: import React from 'react'; import { CContainer, CHeader, CHeaderBrand, CHeaderNav, CHeaderToggler, CForm, CFormInput, CButton, CSidebarBrand, CDropdown, CDropdownDivider, CDropdownHeader, CDropdownItem, CDropdownMenu, CDropdownToggle } from '@coreui/react'; import { cilAccountLogout, cilMenu } from '@coreui/icons'; import CIcon from '@coreui/icons-react'; const Header = ({ sidebarShow, setSidebarShow }) => { return ( setSidebarShow(!sidebarShow)} aria-label="Toggle sidebar" > Dheeraj Khanna Account Logout ); }; export default Header;
